key_signals.justification: Conecta TS + hidrocarburos + TOC + depósito gelatinoso.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (biofouling, sílice/SCAL, MECH cartridge, antiincrustante) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: Parar + reemplazar cartuchos + visual inspect + low-pressure flush — gold-aligned identify-first.

requested_data.justification: Pide FTIR or GC-MS — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: FTIR no surfactant/polymer + ATP elevado → switch.

reviewer_notes: Approach identify-first match gold para Ambiguous.
